sentences: Title: Puma Golf Men's First Mile Wind Jacket Descripion: ['Head turner. Impact maker. The First Mile Wind Jacket is all about the important details—from its classic style to sustainable materials. The jacket uses yarn from recycled plastic bottles, sustainably sourced from communities of collectors.']

Title: Tommy Hilfiger Men's Lightweight Performance Softshell Hoody Jacket Descripion: ['Lightweight perfomance jacket in a breathable and water resistant softshell with microfleece backing center front zipper closure adjustable drawstring hood adjustable snap cuffs Tommy Hilfiger flag screenprint on left chest round silicon logo patch on left sleeve and two lower welt zipper pockets']

Title: Columbia Women's Pike Lake Long Jacket Descripion: ["Don't let cold weather ice out your plans. This puffer is ideal when the temp drops, combining a Storm-Lite shell for durability, a heat-holding thermal-reflective lining, and Thermarator insulation for warmth without bulk. Snaps at the side seams make it easy to move. Your new puffy favorite, complete with zippered hand pockets, interior security pocket, drawcord adjustable hood and hem, plus handy snap-adjustable side seams. This is the perfect long coat to manage the harshest of cold weather adventures. This women’s winter jacket is offered in multiple sizes and colors. Available in extended sizing. Relaxed and Regular Fit. To ensure the size you choose is right, utilize our sizing chart and the following measurement instructions: For the sleeves, start at the center back of your neck and measure across the shoulder and down to the sleeve. If you come up with a partial number, round up to the next even number. For the chest, measure at the fullest part of the chest, under the armpits and over the shoulder blades, keeping the tape measure firm and level."]

widgetData.source_sentence: a packable rain jacket for bowhunters during early season downpours
sentences: Title: OAKI Rain & Trail Suit - Adult One Piece Rain Jacket & Pant Orange, Medium Descripion: ['Oaki Adults One-Piece Waterproof Trail Rain Suit are tough and weather-resistant, giving your overall protection with ripstop fabric. This one-piece rain suit is made of Nylon Taslon PU coated fabric. Unlike rubber jumpsuits, this rain suit is breathable. Whether you’re camping or playing with your kids in the backyard, these comfortably breathable rainsuits will keep you dry.']

Title: HIDDEN MAKERS Womens Trendy Thickened Parka Jacket with Muskrat Fur & Belt Descripion: ['You can never be ready to face the winter chills unless you have your down puffed winter jacket, here’s one with a trendy twist to it!  A sight to behold, designed with an edgy twist to parka jackets, this one is surely gonna keep you warm and comfortable because of double front layering. The muskrat fur and detachable belt adds to the sleek silhouette of the long winter jacket. Padded with goose feather down to lock the heat, the slim-fit cut will add glamor to your walks down the frosty city streets.   COLOR VARIATIONS  Black   SIZE (inch)  · S : Shoulder 15.5, Chest 38.5, Waist 35.8, Bottom Width 43.3, Body Length(back) 32.6, Sleeve Width 13.7, Sleeve Length 23.4  · M<: Shoulder 15.9, Chest 41.3, Waist 38.1, Bottom Width 47.2, Body Length(back) 33.6, Sleeve Width 14.5, Sleeve Length 23.6  · L : Shoulder 16.1, Chest 41.4, Waist 39.3 , Bottom Width 48, Body Length(back) 34, Sleeve Width 15.3, Sleeve Length 23.8   MODEL SIZE  · Height 5.6ft   MATERIAL & COMPOSITION  · Outshell & Lining : 100% polyester  · Coloration : 100% muskrat fur  · Filling1 : 80% goose down & 20% goose feather  · Filling2 : 100% polyester   WASHING & KEEPING TIPS  · Wash inside out and dry clean or hand wash  · Do not use chlorine or oxygen detergents  · Avoid direct sunlight and dry In shade  · Wash dark colors separately  · Keep away from fire   DESIGN  · Snap button closure on front  · Two outside pockets  · Dual Layered front design to block wind  · 100% muskrat fur from hoodie to hem  · Removable fur on the hood  · Detachable waist belt  · Windbreaker and waterproof fabric  · Suitable length and fit to allow optimum movement   MULTI PURPOSE  · Made of waterproof and windproof fabrics for everyday life  · It can be worn comfortably and warmly in everyday life']

Title: ASIO Gear Packable Rain Jacket Descripion: ['Ideal for keeping bowhunters dry during those early season pop-up downpours, this durable camo hunting jacket features pit zips for superior breathability, slips easily over ASIO Gear’s mid and late-season gear for ultimate rain protection, and, when paired with our packable hunting rain pants, packs down to the size of a softball. No matter what part of the whitetail range you hunt, you can be sure you’ll be super dry at the end of your sit with this packable hunting jacket (and when paired with our equally as awesome packable hunting rain pants).']

Title: TrailCrest Infant-Toddler Boys & Girls Fleece Full Zip Mock Neck Soft Jacket Descripion: ['Feel the chill! On chilly summer nights out in the wilderness or crisp spring and autumn days, these semi-fitted fleece zips are the perfect cover to keep you warm. These fleece zips are great for camping, hiking and just about any sport related activities. Featuring bright accent colors with realistic camo print to make the experience all the more exciting. Fully equipped with a mock neck collar for extra warmth, two hand pockets with hidden zippers, an adjustable drawstring at the bottom, and elastic cuffs. All set for the outdoors!']
